signals.headline: Solana (SOL) Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders & Alpenglow Upgrade Advances | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana (SOL) Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders & Alpenglow Upgrade Advances | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana achieved an all-time high of 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions as of April 14, 2026, directly tied to the anticipated Alpenglow consensus upgrade reducing finality to 150ms; institutional holdings by BlackRock and Fidelity also hit records,

signals.headline: Ethereum Foundation Stakes 70K ETH ($143M), Easing Supply Pressure | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Stakes 70K ETH ($143M), Easing Supply Pressure | YES | MED confidence**  
The Ethereum Foundation staked 70,000 ETH, reducing sell-side pressure amid ETH trading at $2,184 with bullish patterns, RSI near oversold, and Layer 2 expansions boosting DeFi dominance.[5][4]
